title: ICAI CA Final May 2026 Results Expected Today, June 18!
content:
# ICAI CA Final May 2026 Results Expected Today, June 18!

Ek important update hai. Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne CA Final May 2026 examination ke results aaj, June 18, 2026 ko announce karne ki jaankari di hai. Lakhon students jo is prestigious exam mein baithe the, unka intezaar aaj khatam hone wala hai.

*   **Result Declaration:** CA Final May 2026 examination ke results aaj, June 18, 2026 ko shaam tak declare hone ki ummeed hai.
*   **How to Check:** Candidates apne results official ICAI result portals par check kar sakte hain. Aapko apna Registration Number aur Roll Number enter karna hoga.
*   **Official Website:** Results ICAI ki official results website, caresults.icai.org, par available honge.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Check the Official Results here](https://caresults.icai.org/)

*Published on: 18 June 2026*
